title: try_send drops MessagesLoaded/ChatsLoaded silently when UI lags
description: send_event uses try_send with a 256-slot channel. Under sustained SSE traffic (active group chat) while the UI render loop is slow, the channel fills and MessagesLoaded or ChatsLoaded events are silently dropped. The UI then displays permanently stale message or chat lists with no indication that data was lost and no retry triggered. The comment says status updates and transient errors are safely droppable, but MessagesLoaded and ChatsLoaded are not: a dropped MessagesLoaded means the message panel stays stale until the next SSE event triggers another load.
